Pebble smartwatch app for golf score tracking, linker script, and build script for app compilation.

## Folders
- **[golf](golf/README.md)**: Pebble smartwatch app for golf score tracking and metadata for the "Golf" app.

## Files
- **[pebble_app.ld](pebble_app.ld.md)**: Linker script for defining memory layout and sections for a Pebble app.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and linking apps in the `stored_apps` directory of the Pebble firmware.
